title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Adda247 Global Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Adda247 Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the Adda247 Global Group family as a Teacher in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Adda247 Global Group:
Adda247 Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247 Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
